# RoyceCode

Native Rust whole-codebase analysis for AI agents.

RoyceCode analyzes mixed-language repositories, builds a semantic graph, and
emits structured JSON artifacts for architectural triage and automated repair
workflows.

## Quick Start

```bash
cargo install --git https://github.com/vojtechhradsky/roycecode.git roycecode --bin roycecode
roycecode analyze /path/to/project
cat /path/to/project/.roycecode/deterministic-analysis.json
```

## Primary Artifacts

- `.roycecode/deterministic-analysis.json`
- `.roycecode/semantic-graph.json`
- `.roycecode/deterministic-findings.json`
- `.roycecode/architecture-surface.json`
- `.roycecode/roycecode-report.json`

## Commands

- `roycecode analyze <path>`
- `roycecode report <path>`
- `roycecode surface <path>`
- `roycecode version`

- [README](https://github.com/vojtechhradsky/roycecode/blob/main/README.md)
